title: 日本ダービーの後に・天命砕きて至るは

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(It was as if the passage of time itself slowed to a
crawl.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Come oooon!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (At this rate... Ngh!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I committed my heart and soul to that race, and
as I ran, I felt nothing else but a desperate desire
to win.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (And in the very moment that desire reached its apex, I heard that sound...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (I want to win... I want to win!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I want to defeat Yaeno and Chiyono O, right here and now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crrrrack!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(The sound of... glass cracking? Are my legs...
broken?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (No, this is—)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (It's the sound of me shattering my limits, right now!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Mejiro Ardan! Mejiro Ardan has crossed the
finish line! The daughter of the Mejiro family has
claimed first place at the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What a fantastic race that was. Everyone racing
out there today... They really shined.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Holy moly! Mejiro Ardan, you were awesome!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: That race was wicked!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I had no idea! To think that the heat of the race
plays home to such a dazzling world of
possibilities!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(And that being able to set foot into that world
and surpass my limits there... took more than my
efforts alone...)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Your running, your drive, and your hunger for
victory... They were all shining beacons of light
that opened up the gates holding me back.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...The way you ran—it was incredible.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Congratulations! I really, really mean it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you for such kind words.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Congratulations on your victory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I admit my defeat. But...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Know that this is not the end. The next time we
compete... I will emerge victorious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It would be my honor to compete with you again.
However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As was the case today, I will have no intention of
relinquishing victory when next we meet. I shall
compete with everything I have.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I would not have it any other way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer.
choice_data_list: Looks like your name will go down in history.
Looks like your name will go down in history.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes. And your name, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The titles of Derby champion and Derby trainer...
Our moment has been immortalized here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...The pleasure is all mine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer, from the bottom of my heart.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Great job, Mejiro Ardan! You'd give Mejiro
Ramonu a run for her money!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Oh, that's right... Up until now, I...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (I forgot all about surpassing my older sister...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The thunderous applause and cheering continue.
Then, as Mejiro Ardan and I make our way back
to the waiting room...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I had an experience most peculiar at the race
today.
choice_data_list: What do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As I neared the finish line, an unfamiliar sensation
welled up inside, as if the whole world was falling
still.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Amidst the silence, I could hear two things very
clearly—Chiyono O and Yaeno's heartbeats, and
the sound of their feet hitting the turf.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
With that rhythm drawing me in... I saw the gates
holding me back—my own limits—and I opened
them. I took my first steps into the new world
beyond...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The sensation I felt in that moment—that there
existed even greater heights—lingers in my hands
even now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And there was something else... Something that
took even me by surprise...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It was only a moment ago that I finally
remembered... my goal to outshine my older
sister...
choice_data_list:
That's because you were giving your all as you
competed with your rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Giving my all... with my rivals...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes... You're quite right...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Those two are my dearest friends... and my
toughest rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And not only that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It's because I competed with everything I could muster—to the point that I forgot about my older sister...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And because they gave that race everything they had too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That I was able to shine even brighter today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's always striven to seize the moment with her
running, so today's discovery will likely change
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...And it'll change me too. I'm sure of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Ardan's legs carry her to a new
world of possibilities!
